title: A blanket I sleep with
summary: Describe a blanket you use at night — what it looks like, how it feels, and why you like it.
prompt: Write 6–8 short sentences about a blanket you sleep with. Describe what it looks like, how it feels, and why you use it. Use present simple and simple adjectives.
hintStarters: I have a blanket that I sleep with every night. It is…
The blanket is… and it feels…
sampleText: I have a blanket that I sleep with every night. I bought it two years ago from a shop in Lisbon. The blanket is dark green with thin white stripes. It is very thick and quite heavy. When I get into bed, I pull it up to my chin and I feel warm quickly. The fabric is soft and does not scratch my skin. In summer, I fold the blanket and put it at the end of the bed. I only use it in the cold months. I wash the blanket once a month. After washing, it feels even softer. My bedroom is often cold in winter because the window is not very tight. But with this blanket, I sleep well even on cold nights. I also use the blanket when I sit on the sofa and watch a film in the evenings. It is a simple thing but I use it every single day in winter.

sampleAnnotations.phrase: dark green with thin white stripes
sampleAnnotations.meaningVi: màu xanh đậm với sọc trắng mỏng

sampleAnnotations.phrase: pull it up to my chin
at the end of the bed

sampleGrammarNotes.title: Simple adjectives before nouns
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyVi: Đặt tính từ trước danh từ trong tiếng Anh: 'a thick blanket', 'thin white stripes', 'a simple thing'. Khi có nhiều tính từ, thường dùng dấu phẩy hoặc 'and'.
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyEn: Place adjectives before nouns in English: 'a thick blanket', 'thin white stripes'. When using two adjectives, use 'and' or a comma: 'very thick and quite heavy'.

sampleGrammarNotes.title: Present simple with 'when'
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyVi: Dùng 'when' với thì hiện tại đơn để nói về điều gì xảy ra trong những tình huống nhất định: 'When I get into bed, I pull it up', 'When I sit on the sofa, I use the blanket'.
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyEn: Use 'when' with the present simple for things that happen in certain situations: 'When I get into bed, I pull it up', 'When I sit on the sofa, I use the blanket'.

sampleTranslationVi: Tôi có một chiếc chăn mà tôi ngủ cùng mỗi đêm. Tôi mua nó hai năm trước ở một cửa hàng tại Lisbon. Chăn có màu xanh đậm với sọc trắng mỏng. Nó rất dày và khá nặng. Khi lên giường, tôi kéo chăn lên đến cằm và cảm thấy ấm nhanh chóng. Vải mềm và không làm xước da. Vào mùa hè, tôi gập chăn lại và để ở cuối giường. Tôi chỉ dùng chăn trong những tháng lạnh. Tôi giặt chăn một tháng một lần. Sau khi giặt, chăn càng mềm hơn. Phòng ngủ của tôi thường lạnh vào mùa đông vì cửa sổ không kín lắm. Nhưng với chiếc chăn này, tôi ngủ ngon ngay cả trong những đêm lạnh. Tôi cũng dùng chăn khi ngồi trên ghế sofa xem phim vào buổi tối. Đó là thứ đơn giản nhưng tôi dùng nó mỗi ngày vào mùa đông.

mcQuestions.prompt: Where did the writer buy the blanket?
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'I bought it two years ago from a shop in Lisbon'.
mcQuestions.hint: Look for the city name in the sentence about buying the blanket.

mcQuestions.prompt: What does the blanket look like?
options: Dark green with thin white stripes
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'The blanket is dark green with thin white stripes'.
mcQuestions.hint: Find the colour and pattern description.

mcQuestions.prompt: What does the writer do with the blanket in summer?
options: Folds it and puts it at the end of the bed
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'In summer, I fold the blanket and put it at the end of the bed'.
mcQuestions.hint: Look for what happens to the blanket in the warm months.

mcQuestions.prompt: How often does the writer wash the blanket?
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'I wash the blanket once a month'.
mcQuestions.hint: Find the phrase that says how often the blanket is washed.

mcQuestions.prompt: Why is the writer's bedroom cold in winter?
options: Because the window is not very tight
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'My bedroom is often cold in winter because the window is not very tight'.
mcQuestions.hint: Look for the reason linked to the window.

mcQuestions.prompt: Which adjective correctly describes the blanket?
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'It is very thick and quite heavy'.
mcQuestions.hint: Find the two adjectives used to describe the blanket's weight and thickness.

mcQuestions.prompt: Where else does the writer use the blanket?
options: On the sofa when watching a film
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'I also use the blanket when I sit on the sofa and watch a film in the evenings'.
mcQuestions.hint: Look for the other situation where the blanket is used.

options: When I am cold, I use the blanket.
I use the blanket when to be cold.
When cold I use the blanket.
I use the blanket when am cold.
mcQuestions.explanation: 'When' starts a clause with a subject and verb: 'When I am cold, I use the blanket'.
mcQuestions.hint: Check which option has a full clause after 'when'.

mcQuestions.prompt: What happens to the blanket after washing?
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'After washing, it feels even softer'.
mcQuestions.hint: Look for the change in the blanket after it is washed.

mcQuestions.prompt: Which word means the same as 'soft' in the context of fabric?
mcQuestions.explanation: 'Smooth' is the closest synonym to 'soft' when describing fabric texture.
mcQuestions.hint: Think about the opposite of rough or scratchy.

criticalThinkingQuestion: Why do many people have a favourite blanket or pillow that they keep for many years? What does comfort mean to you in everyday life?
